judgment.summary: Strong growth metrics are tempered by a high valuation and significant debt load.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.2%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Revenue growth 20.0% YoY and earnings growth 138.9% YoY indicate robust top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth of 136.3% and analyst estimates for current Q and FY above 26% suggest continued momentum.
Return on equity at 16.7% and return on assets at 5.4% show effective use of capital.
A 'buy' consensus from 15 analysts and a mean target price of $197.67 indicate positive institutional sentiment.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 84.83 and Forward P/E of 42.78 indicate a high valuation relative to earnings.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 9.53 and Price/Book of 13.12 also suggest the stock may be richly valued.
Total debt of $9.92B compared to total cash of $1.76B results in a high Debt/Equity ratio of 80.36%.
Free cash flow of $612.00M is positive but may be strained by debt servicing.

news.paragraph: Mizuho recently raised its price target on Corning (GLW), suggesting a positive outlook from at least one analyst. While this is the primary news driver, the stock's performance will also be influenced by upcoming earnings and ongoing analyst sentiment, which currently favors a 'buy' rating. Traders should consider the implications of the raised target within the context of the broader market and the company's upcoming quarterly report.

headlines.title: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Corning (GLW)
